Find Overbooked Employees
solution:
SELECT employee_id
FROM meetings
GROUP BY employee_id, meeting_date
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

title: Split Array by Prime Indices
Coupon Code Validator
Find Drivers with Improved Fuel Efficiency
solution:
SELECT driver_id
FROM trips
GROUP BY driver_id
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN trip_date < '2024-01-01' THEN fuel_efficiency END) <
       AVG(CASE WHEN trip_date >= '2024-01-01' THEN fuel_efficiency END);

title: Number of Integers With Popcount-Depth Equal to K I
Minimum Time to Activate String
Find COVID Recovery Patients
solution:
SELECT patient_id
FROM patients
GROUP BY patient_id
HAVING MAX(status = 'Recovered') = 1
AND MAX(status = 'COVID') = 1;

solution:
SELECT employee_id
FROM performance_reviews
GROUP BY employee_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
AND MIN(score) < MAX(score);
